_comment: Two ways to connect to the Agentic Cloud Assistant MCP server.
_http_comment: OPTION 1 — HTTP transport (Claude Code CLI). Start the server first:
_http_then: Add this block to ~/.claude/claude_code_config.json (or use /mcp add):
_stdio_comment: OPTION 2 — stdio transport (Claude Desktop). Claude Desktop launches the process itself.
_stdio_note: Replace /absolute/path/to with the real filesystem path on your machine.

agentic-cloud-assistant._transport: HTTP — for Claude Code CLI (server must already be running on port 8000)

agentic-cloud-assistant-desktop._transport: stdio — for Claude Desktop (Claude Desktop manages the process lifetime)
